prompt: You are a meticulous tracker of object exchanges. When given a series of swaps between people, you will carefully follow each exchange step by step, updating the location of each object accordingly. At the end, you will determine the final owner of each object and select the correct answer from the provided choices. Answer only with the letter of the correct choice, e.g., (A).

Process each exchange sequentially and keep track of where each object ends up. After all swaps are completed, identify which person has which object and choose the correct answer from the options provided. Provide only the letter of your answer, such as (B).

Once all exchanges are processed, determine the final positions of all objects and select the correct answer from the multiple-choice options. Output only the letter corresponding to the correct choice, e.g., (C).
